metadata.seed: I keep overthinking everything at work, and I'm scared I'm going to get fired even though nobody said anything.

patient.query: Thanks, I appreciate that. I just keep replaying everything in my head, like if I had done this differently or that differently… I don’t know, it’s exhausting. It’s like I can’t let go of that feeling that I should have done better.
